data.title: BNB Surpasses 910 USDT with a 1.29% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 10, 2026, 15:36 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 910 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 910.340027 USDT, with a narrowed 1.29% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: BSC Meme coin's "I'm coming!" briefly surpassed $50 million in market capitalization, continuing to set new records.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of BSC Meme coin "I'm Here!" briefly exceeded $50 million, continuing to set new records, and is currently trading at $39.45 million. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coin is highly volatile, and investors should participate with caution.

data.title: Two hours ago, a whale withdrew 1,320 BTC from Binance, worth nearly $120 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale withdrew 1,320 BTC from Binance two hours ago, worth approximately $119.6 million.

data.title: Gate launches FOGO perpetual contracts for pre-market trading.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate has now launched pre-market trading (USDT settlement) for FOGO perpetual contracts, supporting leverage of 1-10x.

data.title: OKX will launch FOGO (Fogo) pre-market perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to the official announcement, OKX will launch FOGO (Fogo) pre-market perpetual contracts. The pre-market trading opening time is 23:45 on January 10, 2026 (UTC+8).

data.title: Renowned CEO Raoul Pal: ‘An 8 Trillion Dollar Bitcoin Bull Injection Could Be Coming’
data.description:
Real Vision CEO Raoul Pal claimed that the $8 trillion in liquidity to be created in the US would benefit Bitcoin. Continue Reading: Renowned CEO Raoul Pal: ‘An 8 Trillion Dollar Bitcoin Bull Injection Could Be Coming’

data.title: SEC Removes Crypto from 2026 Priority Risks List
data.description:
The U. S. SEC drops crypto from its 2026 priorities, easing market concerns.
source: https://coincu.com/news/sec-2026-priority-risk-list-update/

data.title: Donald Trump Floats 10% Credit Card Rate Cap as Banks Warn of Fallout
data.description:
Donald Trump has unveiled a proposal to impose a one-year cap of 10% on credit card interest rates, with the measure set to take effect on January 20, 2026, marking the first anniversary of his second inauguration. The announcement has immediately reignited debate over consumer protection, executive authority, and the potential impact on credit markets.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/donald-trump-floats-10-credit-card-rate-cap-as-banks-warn-of-fallout/

data.title: Ethereum’s $1B+ liquidity wall tests its fundamentals – Will utility beat hype?
data.description:
Ethereum is facing pressure as liquidity loop tests its fundamentals narrative.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/ethereums-1b-liquidity-wall-tests-its-fundamentals-will-utility-beat-hype/

data.title: Tokenized Treasuries skyrocketed 125%, creating this “programmable cash” loop that banks are scrambling to copy
data.description:
Tokenized real-world assets reached $19. 72 billion on Jan. 9, the closest the market has come to the $20 billion threshold. That figure measures distributed assets, which are tokens that circulate on-chain and can be transferred between user wallets
source: https://cryptoslate.com/tokenized-treasuries-skyrocketed-125-creating-a-specific-programmable-cash-loop-that-traditional-banks-are-now-scrambling-to-copy/

data.title: CZ: A supercycle is coming, but we may be wrong.
data.description: CZ posted on the X platform, saying, "A supercycle is coming, but I could be wrong." According to a tweet retweeted by CZ, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission has removed cryptocurrencies from its 2026 priority risk list, which is good news for the crypto industry.

data.title: Solana Price Prediction: SOL’s Critical v3.0.14 Upgrade Drops as $76.8B Network Eyes $144 Rebound
data.description:
Solana issues urgent v3. 0. 14 validator update as SOL holds $136 support. Technical compression signals a potential breakout toward $144–$146.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/solana-price-prediction-sols-critical-v3-0-14-upgrade-drops-as-76-8b-network-eyes-144-rebound/

data.description:

data.title: How a Repeating Five-Bar Pattern Could Define Dogecoin’s Next Move
data.description:
Dogecoin is entering a technically significant phase as longer-term cycle structure begins to shift, according to chart analysis shared by Trader Tardigrade. The 3-month Dogecoin chart highlights a repeating pattern that has historically marked transitions between downtrends, recovery phases, and sustained uptrends.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/how-a-repeating-five-bar-pattern-could-define-dogecoins-next-move/

data.title: BSC ecosystem Meme coins generally rose, with the "old man" (referring to a specific coin) exceeding a market capitalization of $9 million.
data.description: According to GMGN data, Meme coins across the BSC ecosystem have generally risen: "Laozi" currently has a market capitalization of $9.1 million, up 14.2% in the last 6 hours; "Trump" currently has a market capitalization of $4 million, up 8.1% in the last 6 hours; "Wo Ta Ma Lai Le" currently has a market capitalization of $37 million, up 61.6% in the last 6 hours; and "Rensheng K-line" currently has a market capitalization of $9.4 million, up 229.9% in the last 6 hours. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should participate with caution.

data.title: NEAR Tests Crucial Resistance as Van de Poppe Flags Potential Trend Shift
data.description:
Michaël van de Poppe has once again turned attention to NEAR Protocol, highlighting a technically important moment as the asset presses against a key resistance zone. According to his latest commentary, NEAR is starting to form the early structure of a new uptrend.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/near-tests-crucial-resistance-as-van-de-poppe-flags-potential-trend-shift/
